codeReview.summary: The reviewed scope passes. Commit `e00c9f6` is the relevant implementation for synchronous annotation style persistence, and the current `AnnotationPanel` contract test under `src/components/tools/` matches the expected behavior that only text/OBB annotations trigger edit dialogs. I found no blocking or non-blocking code defects in the reviewed scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission metadata still points the focused AnnotationPanel verification to `src/components/review/AnnotationPanel.test.ts`, but the real component and test live under `src/components/tools/`. This stale path caused the worker to spend time locating the real target.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `features.json` expectedBehavior/verificationSteps name `src/components/review/AnnotationPanel.test.ts`; transcript session `00706867-0ad6-41da-b8ed-c57f9652f44d` shows a failed direct read and then a glob locating `src/components/tools/AnnotationPanel.vue` and `src/components/tools/AnnotationPanel.test.ts`; handoff `2026-03-16T20-16-38-379Z__fix-followup-baseline-annotation-and-style__00706867-0ad6-41da-b8ed-c57f9652f44d.json` records the mismatch.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `designer-tracking-worker` skill requires TDD plus agent-browser manual verification for every task, but this baseline-repair feature was already implemented and fully evidenced by focused/full automated tests. The worker's deviation was justified, so the skill procedure is too rigid for verification-only baseline repair tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md` step 3 requires writing failing tests first and step 6 mandates `agent-browser`; transcript/handoff for session `00706867-0ad6-41da-b8ed-c57f9652f44d` show the worker correctly performed verification only because the implementation already existed and no UI-flow behavior changed.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, relevant commit history, and current source/tests for the annotation/style baseline repair. The feature passes review: synchronous persistence is implemented in `useAnnotationStyleStore`, the current tools-based `AnnotationPanel` contract test matches the expected behavior, and I found no code issues in scope.
